Fern Porrrrcal PnacrrcBs C ovruussroN
P.O. Box 807 . -128 J Street . Slcrarnenro. CA 9-5ltl2-0807
(916) -i22--5660 . Fax (916) 322-0886
October 12,2000
Xochilt Ruvalcaba, Council Member
City of South Gate
8650 California Avenue
South Gate, CA 90280-3075
Re: Your Request for Advice
Dear Council Member Ruvalcaba:
This letter is in response to your request for advice regarding the provisions of the
Political Reform Act (the "Act").r You have asked whether 1) Council Member Bill De Witt
may participate in a decision to remove a potential candidate from a ballot when he is the council
member facing recall; 2) to what circumstances he would have to abstain from voting in
challenging candidates to his recall election; and 3) to what circumstances he would have to
abstain from any other matter which deals with his recall election. As presented, City Council
Member Bill De Witt has not specifically authorized you to seek advice regarding his duties
under the Act, and under its provisions, the Commission is prohibited from giving third parry
(Regulation 18329(b)(2)(A) or past conduct advice (Regulation 18329(bXgXA)).
I have enclosed a copy of Regulation 18329 for your review. Should you have any other
questions regarding this matter, you may contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660.
Sincerely,
Fair Po
ES
By: Joan
Staff Secretary,Legal
Enclosure

18995, of the Califomia Code of Regulations.
